compiled_state.title: Delete orphan: tests/lib/protocol-conformance-harness.sh + baseline
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Simulates the dso remediation-loop protocol: upstream enum 'brainstorm preplanning planner_supplied' (:44), emits REPLAN_ESCALATE:brainstorm (baseline.txt), and sources tests/lib/planning-config.sh which DOES NOT EXIST — broken even if invoked. Evidence: git grep protocol-conformance outside the pair returns nothing.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] git rm tests/lib/protocol-conformance-harness.sh tests/lib/protocol-conformance-baseline.txt
- [ ] Full suite green

comments.body: Done in commit 39dbfba. Full suite 1300 passed / 2 xfailed; targeted bash suites for touched scripts green.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
